gate_decision: Decision: `PASS_TO_TOY_ONLY_PROTOTYPE_RUN` Required method-card inputs are readable; toy-only traces/results are generated in an isolated results directory.
claim_boundary: Online SIPC sees only observed toy reads. Hidden targets and edit metrics are used only after Decode for offline audit. The prototype does not call or read BBS, does not use BBS score/beam/path likelihood, does not use EPBSD, and does not build POA/full graph/full alignment.
